# Sytrex for Brokers

> Sytrex helps elite broker teams replace inbox-driven placement with structured market strategy, real-time carrier capacity tracking, and automated market outreach. Built for retail and wholesale broker teams that want consistent, fast placement across every deal.

## What this site is

The Sytrex landing page for insurance broker teams.

## Who it's for

- Retail and wholesale insurance broker teams
- Heads of placement, brokerage leadership, and producers
- Teams that today rely on email, spreadsheets, and tribal knowledge to track markets

## What Sytrex does for brokers

- Replaces inbox-driven placement with a structured market strategy workflow
- Tracks carrier capacity and appetite in real time
- Automates outreach to markets at the right time, in the right format
- Removes manual deal tracking across the team

## Key claims

- Structured market strategy in place of email chains
- Real-time capacity tracking, not stale spreadsheets
- Automated market outreach, not ad-hoc messaging
- Designed for elite broker teams that handle complex placements

## How it fits with existing systems

Sytrex sits alongside existing AMS and broker systems and focuses on the placement and market strategy layer.

## Company

- Name: Sytrex
- Website: https://www.sytrex.io
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sytrex
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Sytrex_Underwriting

## Contact / next step

Book a demo from the landing page to see Sytrex on a live deal.
